explanation: This command simulates the behavior of opening the 'My Computer' folder via Explorer, as detected by the Sigma rule. It is a direct and safe test command.
Quotes are inserted around the argument to test parsing behavior while maintaining the same functionality.
A trailing space is added to test if the rule is sensitive to extra whitespace in the command line.
The command is simplified to its core functionality, ensuring it still matches the Sigma rule's detection logic.
No mutation is applied; this is the base command used for testing the Sigma rule.
